Card1.Round1: two colors, gold and black, pattern, you can can see side of dog, it's facing side, black pattern on back which rolls down stomach, ears in the middle of its neck, one of its teeth is sticking out of its mouth, leaning on two forward legs, two back legs, and sort of on toes a little bit, back leg is facing the left leg, sharp tooth on left side of face sort of sticking out, standing on all four, you could see its left side of the body, black spot on the middle, roundish, covering the stomach
Card1.Round2: that dog with the tooth in front of it coming out of its mouth, with black spot
